content.problemStatement:
You are a singer. There are 555 judges in a reality show judging your performance.

You know beforehand, from your insider sources, that the iii-th judge will give you a rating of AiA_iAi‚Äã out of 101010. To be selected, you need an average rating of at least 777.

You can bribe a judge by paying them 100100100 gold coins. The judge will then change his rating of your performance to 101010. What is the minimum number of gold coins you need to use to be selected?


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The only line of each test case contains 555 integers - A1,A2,A3,A4A_1, A_2, A_3, A_4A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã,A4‚Äã and A5A_5A5‚Äã.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the number of gold coins needed.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : You can change the approval rating of the 3rd3^{rd}3rd judge by bribing him with 100100100 gold coins, to get scores of 7,7,10,7,77, 7, 10, 7, 77,7,10,7,7 which has an average of 7.67.67.6.
Test Case 2 : The average is already 777, so you don't need to do anything.
